title: Manage forage conservation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage forage conservation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan for forage conservation

pcs.text: Determine end use requirements of forage conservation in farm production system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine end use requirements of forage conservation in farm production system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine end use requirements of forage conservation in farm production system.

pcs.text: Determine forage conservation options and cost benefit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine forage conservation options and cost benefit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine forage conservation options and cost benefit.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select location for forage crop according to variety and target growth stage.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine supporting technology required to enable efficient performance of operations.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan and prepare storage facilities or system for selected forage conservation method.

pcs.text: Identify potential environmental impact of forage conservation activities and develop controls to mitigate damage

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential environmental impact of forage conservation activities and develop controls to mitigate damage.

pcs.text: Determine cost of production and prepare working budget
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine cost of production and prepare working budget?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine cost of production and prepare working budget.

pcs.text: Determine contractor support and negotiate contracts according to production system requirements and budget constraints

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and develop control strategies.
